query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  bi.description AS matched_description,
  bi.lineAmount AS matched_amount,
  bi.accountCode,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyCost * 100, 1) AS margin_pct,
  sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE (s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%')
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue / s.monthlyCost) < 0.5
ORDER BY (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  bi.description AS matched_description,
  bi.lineAmount AS matched_amount,
  bi.accountCode,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyCost * 100, 1) AS margin_pct,
  sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE (s.supplierName LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%ECN%')
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue / s.monthlyCost) < 0.5
ORDER BY (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) ASC
LIMIT 20;
